planscanR 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Run a single web-search query through a backend.

Source: R/discover_backend.R
web_search.Rd

The dispatching half of the search-backend interface. Returns a list of result objects; each is a named list with at least url. Implementations are responsible for honouring include_domains and max_results to the best of the underlying API's ability.

Usage

web_search(backend, query, include_domains = NULL, max_results = 10L)

Arguments

backend

A planscanR_search_backend.

query

Character scalar.

include_domains

Character vector, or NULL for no domain restriction.

max_results

Integer cap on results (default 10).

Value

List of result objects.

On this page
